text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kikuka Sho, and the energy
from the stands can be felt in the runners' tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The boisterous cheers are enough to make even
Mihono Bourbon feel restless, but I manage to
help her calm down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower joins us, bolstered with a strong
sense of determination. In response, the usually
stoic Mihono Bourbon gets spirited, and declares
her own unyielding desire to win.
